description: Notification optimization: cron integration with bots threshold alerting, and scheduled monitoring config in Settings page
steps: Review src/augur/cron.py _send_notifications function. Ensure threshold filtering works: only send notifications when consensus score exceeds alert_threshold. Currently threshold is loaded but not used for filtering - add score-based filtering logic so only results where abs(score) >= threshold or signal is strong get notified.

In dashboard/templates/settings.html, add a 'Scheduled Monitoring' configuration section: (1) Input for cron schedule (default '0 9 * * 1-5' = weekdays 9am). (2) Timezone selector. (3) Alert threshold slider (1-10). (4) Toggle switches for each notification channel (Telegram/Slack/WeChat/Lark). (5) Save button that calls PUT /api/config with the notification settings.
Add /api/cron/config endpoint in dashboard/app.py to get/set cron configuration (reads/writes to ~/.augur/watchlist.yaml via cron module).
Add /api/cron/run-now endpoint to trigger an immediate watchlist analysis run (calls run_watchlist_analysis from cron.py).
acceptance_criteria: Cron notification filtering respects alert_threshold - only sends when score >= threshold
Settings page has scheduled monitoring section with all configuration options
